name: archive-from-attention-records-negative-example
description: handleArchive on a triage-classified attention item must (a) resolve the row, (b) record a NEGATIVE example for the learning loop (because archiving attention is effectively saying the classifier overreached), and (c) promote skip-list for the sender after enough hits.

insertTrackedItems.title: We thought you wanted to see this

db.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM tracked_items WHERE id = $fixture:0 AND state = 'resolved' AND resolution_method = 'manual:button'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM triage_examples WHERE tracked_item_id = $fixture:0 AND kind = 'negative' AND user_queue = 'archive_candidate'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM triage_examples WHERE tracked_item_id = $fixture:0 AND kind = 'positive'
